alert_rule: alert if any S1 exceeds 4h or 30d avg > 3h
alert if any S2 exceeds 24h or 30d avg > 16h
alert if any S3 exceeds 72h or 30d avg > 48h
alert if 30d rate drops below 40% (indicates poor fallback paths)
alert if S1 count exceeds 3 in any month
alert if total incident count exceeds 15 in any month
alert if any required RCA is not completed within 48h
alert if open corrective actions exceed 10% of total
alert if same FM-XX-NN recurs within 90d at rate > 10%
alert if gate retries succeed less than 50% over 90d
alert if any blocker report unresolved after 48h
